# NosytLabs

> NosytLabs is an independent US-based studio (NOSYT LLC, New Mexico) building open-source AI agents, MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, and small fast web tools. Independent studio from New Mexico.

NosytLabs ships practical open-source tools for developers working with AI systems, browser automation, and privacy-preserving infrastructure. Everything is MIT-licensed unless stated otherwise.

## Products & Tools

- [OpenClaw Droid](https://github.com/NosytLabs/openclaw-droid): OpenClaw AI Gateway optimized for Android Termux — run LLMs on mobile
- [openclaw-free-mcp-servers](https://github.com/NosytLabs/openclaw-free-mcp-servers): FREE Image Generation and TTS MCP servers, no API keys required
- [employee.md](https://github.com/NosytLabs/employee-md): Open specification for AI agent employment contracts in the internet-native economy
- [Presearch Search Skill](https://github.com/NosytLabs/presearch-search-skill): Privacy-first decentralized search skill for AI agents
- [Tidefall Phaser](https://github.com/NosytLabs/tidefall-phaser): Browser fishing game — 44 fish types, Phaser 3

## Services

- [AI Agents](https://nosytlabs.com): Custom AI agent development with MCP integration
- [MCP Servers](https://nosytlabs.com): Model Context Protocol server design and deployment
- [Web Apps](https://nosytlabs.com): Small, fast, privacy-respecting web tools

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://nosytlabs.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/NosytLabs
- Location: New Mexico, USA

- [Privacy Policy](https://nosytlabs.com/privacy.html): Data handling policy
